falsification_conditions.condition: S&P 500 closes below 4,150 on any single day in the next 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: The 80% pattern match to bottom_2024_aug is invalidated because the August 2024 low held at ~4,120; a break below 4,150 would violate the structural support level that defined that bottom pattern, proving this is not a similar accumulation structure

falsification_conditions.condition: VIX closes above 35 for 2 consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: The BLOWOFF SCORE of 39 suggests controlled de-risking; sustained VIX >35 indicates panic-driven liquidation rather than measured bottoming, invalidating the 'bottom formation' signal and confirming distribution instead of accumulation

falsification_conditions.condition: 10Y Treasury yield breaks above 4.75% and holds there for 3+ consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: The August 2024 bottom occurred with yields peaking near 4.25%; a sustained move to 4.75%+ would indicate a fundamentally different macro regime (inflation resurgence or term premium shock), proving the pattern match is spurious and the HOLD signal should have been a defensive exit

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
